title: manettia luteorubra
intro: Manettia luteorubra, also known as the yellow-ruby manettia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Caribbean and Central America, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. Manettia luteorubra is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
